children.text: The Delegation of Cangrejos performed the following set list in 2026 for Encuentro de Tambores:
“Cunya de la Peromia,” “Misereriere,” “Petronila Guilbe,” “Ay, mis Barriles,”

in the Plaza de los Obreros on March 29. The festival began at 1:00 p.m. and concluded at 5:00 p.m. Delegations arrived as early as 6:00 a.m. for registration. I was part of this year’s delegation, which was directed by Caridad Martínez, daughter of Tata Cepeda, and dedicated to Tite Curet Alonso, the renowned salsero honored this year.
